select.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRY WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}

SELECT O.ORDER_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, OD.DETAIL_ID FROM ORDERS O JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND OD.DETAIL_ID = #{detailId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND NVL(CANCEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'

>>>>>>> origin/main SELECT O.ORDER_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, OD.DETAIL_ID AS DETAIL_ID, NVL(OD.CANCEL_STATUS, 'NONE') AS CANCEL_STATUS FROM ORDERS O JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND OD.DETAIL_ID = #{detailId}
SELECT PET_NO AS petNo, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, PET_TYPE AS petType, PET_NAME AS petName, PET_AGE AS petAge, PET_WEIGHT AS petWeight, PET_PHOTO AS petPhoto FROM PET WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
select.insert: INSERT INTO PET ( PET_NO, MEMBER_NO, PET_TYPE, PET_NAME, PET_AGE, PET_WEIGHT, PET_PHOTO ) VALUES ( SEQ_PET.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{petType}, #{petName}, #{petAge}, #{petWeight}, #{petPhoto} )
select.update: UPDATE PET SET PET_TYPE = #{petType}, PET_NAME = #{petName}, PET_AGE = #{petAge}, PET_WEIGHT = #{petWeight}, PET_PHOTO = #{petPhoto} WHERE PET_NO = #{petNo}
select.select:
SELECT P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS photo1, OD.DETAIL_PRICE AS detailPrice, O.ORDER_ID AS orderId, O.RECV_ADDRESS AS recvAddress, S.DELIVERY_STATUS AS deliveryStatus, C.ADDRESS_ADDRESS AS addressAddress
FROM ORDERS O JOIN MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = O.MEMBER_NO JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.ORDER_ID = D.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS S ON D.DELIVERY_ID = S.DELIVERY_ID WHERE M.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND OD.DETAIL_ID = #{detailId} AND O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
